creator: Helbig@MX.BA-Stuttgart.De
text:
>  * As soon as I've some time--after cleanly closing the xview-lib PR--
>  * I'll try the portlint package on spinne and put the new port back
>  * on ftp.ba-stuttgart.de. (I don't want to fill up the ftp.FreeBSD.org
>  * disks with zillions of spinne-versions)
> 
> Well, if it already works for -current (and for most people for 2.2.x
> as well), we can put it in the ports tree.
> 
> As for ftp.freebsd.org, I just deleted the old spinne tarballs in
> incoming, go ahead and put it there.

Done.

Wolfgang
>
